Video.summary: Cesar's English adventure ends with an aggressive Klee Kai, a collie mix that hates walks, and a hyper Labrador.
Video.title: Battle of Britain

Video.summary: Cesar helps owners of rescue dogs including a terrier mix that screams and a Belgian Tervuren scared of her own home; Cesar helps a family adopting their first dog.
Video.title: Hounds From Hell

Video.summary: A wheaten terrier mix is so attached to her owner that she won't leave his side; a shar-pei who is aggressive towards other dogs.
Video.title: The Gladiator

Video.summary: An English Bulldog who is destroying her owner's house and aggressive towards their other dog; Howie Mandel's chihuahua is aggressive towards him and his wife.
Video.title: Howie Mandel's Big Deal

Video.summary: Cesar helps the lead singer of Rooney with his aggressive pit bull, while writer and producer Paul needs help with his two Boston terriers.
Video.title: Anger Management

Video.summary: A close-knit community on Moorpark in California finds itself endangered by a collection of mischievous dogs, including three huskies.
Video.title: Desperate Housedogs

Video.summary: Cesar comes to the aid of his good friend Dr Rick Garcia, a vet who is having trouble taming a terrier with epilepsy; Cesar helps a timid Rottweiler called Tank.
Video.title: A Dog and His Boy; Mobile Vet

Image.alt: A Dog and His Boy; Mobile Vet
A Dog and His Boy; Mobile Vet
A Dog and His Boy; Mobile Vet
A Dog and His Boy; Mobile Vet
A Dog and His Boy; Mobile Vet
A Dog and His Boy; Mobile Vet

Video.summary: When Susan MacDonald met Cobar, an Australian koolie dog, she thought it would be a match made in heaven, but she was wrong; a Shar-Pei mix is afraid of his own reflection.
Video.title: Stuck in the Mirror

Video.summary: A border collie/greyhound mix with an aversion to other dogs; a woman tries to tame her dog's nervousness; a large dog with too much energy.
Video.title: Gotti's Honor

Video.summary: A Pointer mix is fixated on pine cones, while an Australian shepherd whines every time his owner switches on the vacuum cleaner.
Video.title: High Anxiety

Video.summary: Problem dogs in the U.K. including two dogs that spent most of their lives in Africa, and a barking Jack Russell terrier mix.
Video.title: Cesar Conquers London

Video.summary: Cesar brings discipline to four chaotic Chinese crested dogs, an over-energetic mastiff mix and two unruly miniature dachshunds.
Video.title: Jersey Shore Dogs

Video.summary: Cesar revisits some of his toughest cases and explores the history or misunderstood dog breeds to dispel myths about aggression.
Video.title: Most Aggressive Breeds

Video.summary: Cesar helps Casey Anderson, of "Expedition Wild," and his wife, actress Missi Pyle, with their dogs; a pit bull's fears make him aggressive.
Video.title: Grizzly Dogs

Video.summary: Cesar helps a newlywed couple whose dogs don't let them get close and another pair who met online and are nervous about introducing their dogs.
Video.title: Home-Wrecking Hounds

Video.summary: Cesar helps Melody and Tom, who is so terrified of dogs that he will even leave a job site if one is near, deal with their fears and anxieties.
Video.title: Hounded By Fear

Video.summary: Cesar helps actress Rhona Mitra curb her bulldog's violent tendencies; a newly-wed couple's Chihuahua assumes dominance over their sheltie mix.
Video.title: Honeymoon Hell

Video.summary: Cesar tries to restore the peace between a Chihuahua mix and a Mastiff, and tackles an out-of-control pit bull puppy.
Video.title: Caged Heat

Video.summary: NASA astronauts Suni Williams and Leland Melvin have worked on the International Space Station, but need Cesar's help with canine problems.
Video.title: Cesar, We Have a Problem

Video.summary: Cesar helps two former gang members through Homeboy Industries, an outreach program designed to break the cycle of gang violence but who have problem dogs at home.
Video.title: Homeboys and Hounds

Video.summary: Young fans Jessica and Rachel join Cesar as he deals with a tiny dog with an outsized personality and a nervous pit bull mix afraid of the sea.
Video.title: Pack Leaders in Training

Video.summary: Cesar joins forces with Jennifer McCarthy to examine the nature of wolf-dogs, the result of the cross-breeding of wolves and domestic dogs.
Video.title: Wolf-Dogs: Out of the Wild

Video.summary: British problem dogs including wild German Shepherds, a dog that must be muzzled by court order, and an English cocker spaniel that hates cars.
Video.title: London Calling

Video.summary: Cesar travels to the U.K. to help troubled dog owners with a territorial street dog and a dalmatian whose personality can turn ugly.
Video.title: Horrible Hounds of the U.K.
